setup.title:
Choose
driver name
setup.subtitle: This name is stored on your device and used whenever you create or join a room.
setup.helper: You can change it later from the profile tab.
home.title:
SELECT
YOUR
MODE
home.connectedSubtitle: Enter a mode and move into the room flow.
home.reconnectingSubtitle: Socket is reconnecting. You can still browse the modes.
home.featuredError: Featured car is unavailable right now.
home.carGuessDescription: Choose the right car from four options before anyone else does.
home.imposterDescription: One player sees a different car. Talk outside the app and find them.
games.title: Choose a mode
games.subtitle: Pick a game mode below to create or join a room.
games.tip: Choose one of the two live multiplayer modes.
entry.guessNote: Note: best with at least 2 players.
entry.joinHelper: Enter a room code from the host.
profile.subtitle: Your name is stored only on this device and used when you enter rooms.
profile.helper: Save before creating or joining a room if you want to use the new name.
profile.sellerChoiceSubtitle: Choose whether you want to sign in to an existing seller account or complete a new seller signup.
profile.sellerPinSignInSubtitle: Enter your phone number and 4-digit PIN.
profile.sellerPinSignInHelper: Use the phone number and PIN from your seller account.
profile.sellerAccessSubtitle: Enter the one-time code sent by the admin to start seller signup.
profile.sellerAccessHelper: After 4 wrong tries, this number is blocked for 15 minutes.
profile.sellerSignupSubtitle: Complete your seller info to unlock seller posting.
profile.sellerAccountSubtitle: Your seller profile is active. You can post cars for sale from here.
profile.logoutConfirmMessage: Do you want to log out from this seller account on this device?
profile.historySubtitle: See the cars you have already posted and request featured placement when needed.
profile.historyError: Seller history is unavailable right now.
profile.historyEmpty: You have not posted any cars yet.
profile.historyDeleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {value}?
profile.postCarSuccess: Your sell car is live now.
profile.postCarSubtitle: Add the core car details with the same strict fields the backend validates.
profile.postCarPhotosHelper: Choose the car photos you want to upload with this listing.
profile.editCarSubtitle: Update your live listing with the same strict fields the backend validates.
profile.postCarBrandHelper: Choose a brand from the catalog reference data.
profile.postCarModelHelper: Choose a model from the selected brand.
profile.postCarEmptyModels: Choose an exact brand first to unlock its models.
profile.postCarInvalidNumbers: Year, price, mileage, and rim size must be valid numbers.
profile.postCarInvalidReference: Choose a valid brand and model from the reference catalog.
profile.postCarPhotoPermissionError: Photo access is required to choose car images.
profile.requiredFieldsError: All required fields must be filled.
profile.pinMismatchError: PIN and confirm PIN must match.
profile.sellerUnavailable: Seller access is unavailable right now.
catalog.noModelsFound: No models found for this brand.
